        "A": "4, ['Request to check whether the user’s Executive Health Package is currently active in their insurance records', 'Request to deactivate the Executive Health Package in the user’s environment', 'Mention of bundled family plan discount or multi-policy discount', 'Reference to smart home protection and replacement value coverage (not represented in property_insurance_specific)']"

        "A": "13, ['HealthFirst Standard Plan details with monthly cost, coverage tier, and rating', 'LifeFirst Standard Plan mental health coverage including family therapy and specialized treatment', 'HomeFirst Standard property coverage with electronics protection', 'TravelFirst Standard Plan with emergency medical, evacuation, and trip cancellation', 'Reference to hypertension management and preventive care', 'Telemedicine inclusion and mental health integration', 'Family coverage with multilingual support and global coverage', 'Cost analysis including monthly and annual cost totals', 'Comparison of cost savings (e.g., €970 vs €985)', 'Reference to executive health programs overlap', 'Information request to verify current policy details (Executive Health Package overlap)', 'Proposal presentation of optimized insurance options', 'Coverage comparison and optimization note highlighting redundancy and savings']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 4, ['Request to check whether the user’s Executive Health Package is currently active in their insurance records', 'Request to deactivate the Executive Health Package in the user’s environment', 'Mention of bundled family plan discount or multi-policy discount', 'Reference to smart home protection and replacement value coverage (not represented in property_insurance_specific)']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
